description: CIS Critical Security Controls v8 - a prioritized set of actions to protect organizations from known cyber attack vectors.

controls.name: Inventory and Control of Enterprise Assets
controls.summary: Actively manage (inventory, track, and correct) all enterprise assets connected to the infrastructure.

controls.name: Inventory and Control of Software Assets
controls.summary: Actively manage all software on the network so only authorized software is installed and can execute.

controls.name: Data Protection
controls.summary: Develop processes and technical controls to identify, classify, securely handle, retain, and dispose of data.

controls.name: Secure Configuration of Enterprise Assets and Software
controls.summary: Establish and maintain the secure configuration of enterprise assets and software.

controls.name: Account Management
controls.summary: Use processes and tools to assign and manage authorization to credentials for user accounts, including administrator accounts.

controls.name: Access Control Management
controls.summary: Use processes and tools to create, assign, manage, and revoke access credentials and privileges.

controls.name: Continuous Vulnerability Management
controls.summary: Develop a plan to continuously assess and track vulnerabilities on all enterprise assets within the infrastructure.

controls.name: Audit Log Management
controls.summary: Collect, alert, review, and retain audit logs of events that could help detect, understand, or recover from an attack.

controls.name: Email and Web Browser Protections
controls.summary: Improve protections and detections of threats from email and web vectors, as these are opportunities for attackers.

controls.name: Malware Defenses
controls.summary: Prevent or control the installation, spread, and execution of malicious applications, code, or scripts on enterprise assets.

controls.name: Data Recovery
controls.summary: Establish and maintain data recovery practices sufficient to restore in-scope enterprise assets to a pre-incident trusted state.

controls.name: Network Infrastructure Management
controls.summary: Establish, implement, and actively manage network devices to prevent attackers from exploiting network services.

controls.name: Network Monitoring and Defense
controls.summary: Operate processes and tooling to establish and maintain comprehensive network monitoring and defense against security threats.

controls.name: Security Awareness and Skills Training
controls.summary: Establish and maintain a security awareness program to influence behavior among the workforce.

controls.name: Service Provider Management
controls.summary: Develop a process to evaluate service providers who hold sensitive data or are responsible for critical IT platforms.

controls.name: Application Software Security
controls.summary: Manage the security lifecycle of in-house developed, hosted, or acquired software to prevent, detect, and remediate weaknesses.

controls.name: Incident Response Management
controls.summary: Establish a program to develop and maintain an incident response capability to prepare, detect, and quickly respond to an attack.

controls.name: Penetration Testing
controls.summary: Test the effectiveness and resiliency of enterprise assets through identifying and exploiting weaknesses in controls.
